description: RustFS is a high-performance, distributed object storage system built in Rust. It combines the simplicity of MinIO with the memory safety and raw performance of Rust. It offers full S3 compatibility, is completely open-source under Apache 2.0 license, and is optimized for data lakes, AI, and big data workloads.
tagline: High-performance S3-compatible object storage built in Rust
author: BigBearCommunity

tips.before_install: The container runs as non-root user (UID 10001). Ensure your data directories have correct ownership: chown -R 10001:10001 /path/to/data

title: RustFS
